label: p10_q8_t16_scale_broadcast_rejected

hardware.note: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100; W7900 not rerun

change_tested: Temporary q8_0_t16_gemv.hip change: load the 16 per-column Q8_0 scales only on lane0 of each wave and broadcast with __shfl instead of each lane loading scales directly. Change was reverted before commit.

validation.pytest: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run pytest tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py -q -> 61 passed before and after revert
validation.correctness_scope: kernel unit/dispatch tests plus finite logits in benchmark; performance regressed

command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_AOTRITON_PREFILL=v3 HIPENGINE_GGUF_ALLOW_UNSAFE_QWEN35MOE_FASTPATHS=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. uv run python scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 4096 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --use-wmma-prefill --use-gemv-decode --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/hipengine-gguf-q8-scale-broadcast-4k-128.json

baseline.mode: V3 4K/128 from AOTriton diagnostic before temporary q8 change

decision: Rejected and reverted. Wave-level scale broadcast reduced global scale loads but added shuffle/control overhead and dropped 4K/128 decode by ~26.7%. Do not retry this form; next Q8 work should use rocprof/SASS or a separate experimental branch with improved mapping, not a simple __shfl broadcast.
